🎉 Create a Board

Never Miss a Meaningful Moment Again

Automated alerts ensure important milestones, celebration deadlines, and recognition opportunities are always captured — before it's too late.

Set Up AlertsHow It Works
WorkKudo — Alerts
🎂
Birthday in 3 daysAlex R. · Engineering Team
🎊
5-Year Anniversary TodayMaya S. · Product Design
⏰
Board closes in 24hSarah's Farewell · 12 signed

Important Milestones Are Often Forgotten Until It's Too Late

Birthdays pass uncelebrated. Work anniversaries go unacknowledged. Colleagues leave without a proper farewell. Not because people don't care — but because nobody remembered to organize anything in time.

Alerts solve this by automatically surfacing upcoming milestones and sending timely reminders to the people responsible for making recognition happen.

1Important dates slip through without visibility or reminders
2HR teams can't manually track milestones for hundreds of employees
3Missed celebrations signal to employees that they aren't valued
4Board contribution deadlines arrive before anyone has contributed
🔔 Upcoming Milestones
🎂Birthday

Alex R. — Birthday in 3 Days

"Alert sent to the team 5 days in advance. Board was fully signed by 22 people before Alex even woke up on her birthday."

WorkKudo AlertsEngineering Team · Auto-notified
🎊Anniversary

Maya's 5-Year Work Anniversary

"The reminder came two weeks out — plenty of time to organize a proper celebration. She was genuinely moved by the response."

WorkKudo AlertsProduct Design · Auto-notified
⏰Deadline

Sarah's Farewell Board Closes in 24h

"12 contributors had already signed. The deadline alert pushed 8 more teammates to add their messages before the board was delivered."

WorkKudo AlertsPeople Ops · Auto-notified

Intelligent Alerts That Keep Recognition on Schedule

Alerts automatically surface what matters and notify the right people at the right time.

1 / 6
📅

Milestone Tracking

Birthdays, work anniversaries, probation completions, and promotions are tracked automatically and surfaced before the date.

How It Works

01
🔌

Connect or Configure

Connect your Notion workspace or manually add key milestone dates for your team.

02
📅

Alerts Are Scheduled

WorkKudo creates a timeline of upcoming milestones and schedules alerts based on your preferences.

03
🔔

Teams Are Notified

The right people receive timely notifications through email or Notion — with enough time to act.

04
🎉

Nothing Gets Missed

Every milestone is captured, every celebration is organized, and every employee feels recognized on their special day.

🔌

Connect or Configure

Connect your Notion workspace or manually add key milestone dates for your team.

Use Cases

See how organizations put Alerts to work.

🎂

Birthdays

Ensure every employee birthday is celebrated with a board organized well in advance.

🎊

Work Anniversaries

Automatically surface upcoming work anniversaries so managers can prepare meaningful recognition.

🚀

Promotions

Alert HR and team leads when a promotion is logged so recognition can be organized immediately.

👋

Farewells

Set deadline alerts for farewell boards so colleagues have enough time to contribute before the last day.

Plan retirement celebrations well ahead of time with automated milestone alerts set up in WorkKudo.

⏰

Campaign Deadlines

Remind contributors before recognition campaigns close so participation stays high throughout the program.

🎯

Recognition Drives

Send timely reminders during recognition campaigns to sustain participation momentum.

🔔

Custom Milestones

Set alerts for any custom organizational milestone — project completions, team formations, or company events.

Why It Matters

✅

Better Participation

Timely contribution reminders dramatically increase the number of teammates who sign each board.

🔔

Consistent Recognition

Automated alerts ensure recognition happens consistently — not just when someone remembers.

💛

Fewer Missed Moments

No employee's birthday, anniversary, or milestone goes unacknowledged because of a forgotten date.

🌱

Stronger Culture

Consistent, timely recognition signals to employees that the organization genuinely cares.

⚡

Less Manual Work

Automated scheduling and reminders eliminate manual calendar tracking, saving time for HR and managers.

😊

Employee Confidence

Employees feel more secure knowing that their milestones will always be acknowledged and celebrated.

Alerts — FAQs

How WorkKudo ensures no important moment goes uncelebrated.

Set up automated alerts that keep your team informed, your recognition consistent, and your employees feeling genuinely valued — every time.
